top_signals.title: After $450M project, Port of Virginia goes deep to raise the bar among East Coast container gateways
top_signals.summary:
In the arms race among East Coast container ports, the Port of Virginia has raised the bar by deepening the harbor. 

The post After $450M project, Port of Virginia goes deep to raise the bar among East Coast container gateways appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Terrell Owens, Syntilay Launch Pickleball Recovery Shoe
top_signals.summary: NFL Hall of Famer Terrell Owens & Syntilay CEO Ben Weiss sit down to discuss their collaboration on the TO Reset recovery shoe for pickleball on June 22, 2026. They discussed the 3D-printing technology used to personalize each shoe they make, and how important foot support is for athletes. They speak with Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: AryStinger botnet infected thousands of D-Link routers worldwide
top_signals.summary: A previously undocumented malware botnet named AryStinger has compromised more than 4,000 outdated routers to turn them into proxies for malicious traffic. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK PM Starmer resigns as Britain faces its seventh leader in 10 years
top_signals.summary: Keir Starmer said he will resign as U.K. prime minister and Labour leader, triggering a contest to choose his successor.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: Drugmaker’s largest deal in more than half a decade comes amid surge of M&A in sector

top_signals.title: Microsoft links Mastra AI supply chain attack to North Korean hackers
top_signals.summary: Microsoft has attributed a recent Mastra AI supply chain attack that compromised more than 140 npm packages to the North Korean hacking group Sapphire Sleet, also known as BlueNoroff. [...]
